message:
✨ Add mobile responsive layout for iPhone and iPad (#361)

* feat: add mobile detection hook and sidebar mobile state

- Add useMobile hook for viewport detection (< 768px)
- Add isMobileOpen state to sidebar config
- Add open/close/toggle functions for mobile sidebar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add mobile overlay behavior to sidebar

- Sidebar slides in from left as overlay on mobile
- Add backdrop when open on mobile
- Auto-close sidebar on route navigation
- Hide collapse toggle button on mobile
- Always show expanded view on mobile (not collapsed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add hamburger menu and responsive navbar for mobile

- Add hamburger menu button to toggle mobile sidebar
- Move most navbar items to overflow menu on mobile
- Keep visible on mobile: logo, theme toggle, alerts, user menu
- Add mobile overflow menu with all hidden items
- Responsive padding and spacing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add responsive margins and banner positioning

- Remove fixed left margin on mobile (sidebar overlays content)
- Banners are full-width on mobile
- Reduce main content padding on mobile (p-4 vs p-6)
- Hide long banner descriptions on mobile
- Mobile-friendly banner buttons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: convert mission sidebar to bottom sheet on mobile

- Bottom sheet slides up from bottom on mobile
- Add mobile backdrop overlay
- Add drag handle indicator for mobile
- Max height 80vh on mobile with rounded corners
- Hide fullscreen/minimize controls on mobile
- Center toggle button at bottom on mobile
- Rotate chevron icon for bottom sheet

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: make drill-down modal responsive for mobile

- Full width and 95% height on mobile
- Reduced padding on mobile (p-3/p-4)
- Hide keyboard hints on mobile
- Smaller outer padding on mobile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: remove unused isMobile import from Navbar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
+
+const MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 768 // Tailwind's md breakpoint
+
+export function useMobile() {
+  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(() => {
+    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return false
+    return window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT
+  })
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const mediaQuery = window.matchMedia(`(max-width: ${MOBILE_BREAKPOINT - 1}px)`)
+
+    const handleChange = (e: MediaQueryListEvent) => {
+      setIsMobile(e.matches)
+    }
+
+    // Set initial value
+    setIsMobile(mediaQuery.matches)
+
+    // Listen for changes
+    mediaQuery.addEventListener('change', handleChange)
+    return () => mediaQuery.removeEventListener('change', handleChange)
+  }, [])
+
+  return { isMobile }
+}
